subject: milestone readiness update for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-8653
body: Please note the milestone stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-8653. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
